case_title: PATEL, JACK vs. DALY, DAWN et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT DALY, DAWN MAYNATT, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DALY, DAWN MAYNATT, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 172-6TH ST, #321, S.F, CA, STAYED UNTIL MAY-15-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANTS MOVE BY 5/15/93, RENT AND DAMAGES ARE WAIVED. OTHERWISE THE SUM OF $1380.00 IS OWING.
ASSIGNMENT TO PRO TEM BERNSTEIN IN DEPT. #8 COURT CONVENES. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT REACHED BY STIPULATION. POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 172-6TH ST, #321 TO PLAINTIFF. FURTHER DETAILS IN FILE.
